summary: Iteration 43: Comprehensive Chat UI and Legal Pages Testing - ALL TESTS PASSED. Chat interface works correctly across desktop (1920px), tablet (768px), and mobile (375px) viewports. All 4 legal pages load with correct content. Footer links and cookie banner verified.

issues: Minor: German sidebar role shows 'Advisor' instead of 'KI-Berater' (translations.js line 140). Mobile header correctly shows 'KI-Berater' from aiLabel object.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all chat and legal page tests passed)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All chat UI features verified working. Legal pages complete with correct section numbering. Minor translation inconsistency noted (sidebar role 'Advisor' vs 'KI-Berater').

CHAT_1_Desktop_Open.details: Chat opens via 'Beratung starten' button, 2-column layout with sidebar (260px) + main area

CHAT_2_Desktop_Sidebar.details: NeXifyAI brand with logo, role label, description, 5 preset buttons, 'Angebot anfordern', 'Termin buchen', 'Neue Unterhaltung' buttons all present

CHAT_3_Assistant_Response.details: Assistant messages have avatar icon, sender label 'KI-BERATER', timestamp, markdown rendering

CHAT_4_User_Message.details: User messages aligned right (flex-end), sender label 'SIE', timestamp present

CHAT_5_Input_Area.details: Input field with placeholder, send button, AI disclaimer text at bottom

CHAT_6_Desktop_Close.details: X button in top-right corner closes chat correctly

CHAT_7_Mobile_Fullscreen.details: At 375px: Full-screen chat with mobile header showing back arrow, NeXifyAI brand, green status dot. Desktop close button hidden.

CHAT_8_Mobile_Messages.details: Messages display correctly at 375px with smaller font (14px), rounded bubbles (border-radius: 12px)

CHAT_10_Tablet_Layout.details: At 768px: Sidebar visible (desktop layout), mobile header also visible (transitional state)

CHAT_11_API_MultiTurn.details: POST /api/chat/message responds correctly, multi-turn conversation maintains context (6/6 pytest tests passed)

CHAT_12_Floating_Buttons.details: At 375px: WhatsApp and ChatTrigger hidden when chat open (body.chat-open class applied)

LEGAL_2_Datenschutz.details: /de/datenschutz has correct section numbering 1-6, no duplicate section 4

LEGAL_3_AGB.details: /de/agb loads with correct AGB content (Geltungsbereich, Vertragsgegenstand)

LEGAL_4_KI_Hinweise.details: /de/ki-hinweise loads with EU AI Act reference, KI transparency content

LEGAL_5_Footer_Links.details: Footer contains links to all 4 legal pages: Impressum, Datenschutz, AGB, KI-Hinweise

LEGAL_6_Cookie_Banner.details: Cookie banner has working Datenschutz link
